title: Creamy Tomato Soup with Basil & Sausage
ingredients: 16 fresh basil leaves, stacked, rolled and thinly sliced
instructions:
In a large pot heat the olive oil and cook the sausage until browned. Breaking it apart into smaller pieces while you cook.
Stir in the fresh basil, pasta sauce, water, half & half and salt & pepper.
Cook until heated through. Serve with warm bread.
